prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约18356名→16211名→19303名→17854名→18006名，整体在16200–19300名区间波动；2023年出现明显后移（19303名），2024–20 25年稳定在17800–18000名附近，2025年基准约18006名；本省物理类计划2021年14人→2022年13人→2023年11人→2024年9人→2025年8人，呈持续缩减趋势；2026年 计划增至10人，较2025年扩招25%（增加2人），扩招幅度显著，竞争压力明显缓解，位次数字预计大幅后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2025 年第180名、2026年第177名，排名略有上升；作为全国体育类院校最高学府，在体育学科领域具有不可替代的地位；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及排球联赛 主场争议等事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；但抖音热度排名第18（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，体育类院校特色鲜明，对目标考生群体仍有较强吸引力；体育学为A+学科（全国顶尖），与该校运动康复、运动人体科学、智能体育工程等物理类招生专业高度关联；数据科学与大数据技术专业依托体育大数据方向形成差异 化特色。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类/数据科学类专业社会热度持续偏热（推荐），可能提升数据科学与大数据技术专业的报考热度；康复治疗类专业热度平稳；本省2026 年高考总人数约20万，按近年物理类占比约72%估算约14.36万人，较2025年（14.34万）基本持平；该校位于北京市（非本省），对辽宁考生属于跨省报考；辽宁省在该校全国招生中占比约2%–3%，非主要生源地，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类大幅扩招25%（从8人增至10人）是影响位次的最关键因素，扩招将显著拉低位次（位次数字增大）；学校声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考热度，但抖音 高热和计算机类专业热度偏热形成一定对冲；本省考生数基本稳定，考虑声誉偏负面小幅回调，预测最低位次约20657名，区间20157–21157名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 18356 → 16211 → 19303 → 17854 → 18006, fluctuating within the 16200–19300 range; in 2023, there was a significant backward shift (19303), while 2024–2025 stabilized around 17800–18000, with a 2025 baseline of about 18006; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 14 in 2021 → 13 in 2022 → 11 in 2023 → 9 in 2024 → 8 in 2025, showing a continuous reduction trend; in 2026, the plan increases to 10, a 25% expansion (increase of 2) compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure and expected to greatly shift the ranking number backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 180th in 2025 and 177th in 2026 on the Soft Science main ranking, showing a slight rise; as the highest institution in the national sports category, it holds an irreplaceable position in the field of sports science; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving incidents such as the volleyball league home court controversy, which may mildly suppress some candidates' application psychology; however, it ranks 18th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, and the distinctive characteristics of sports universities still strongly attract the target candidate group; Sports Science is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly correlated with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors such as Sports Rehabilitation, Sports Human Science, and Intelligent Sports Engineering; the Data Science and Big Data Technology major forms a differentiated feature based on the sports big data direction.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer/Data Science majors continue to be socially popular (recommended), potentially increasing the application heat for the Data Science and Big Data Technology major; Rehabilitation Therapy majors have stable popularity; the total number of Gaokao candidates in the province in 2026 is about 200,000, with an estimated 143,600 in the Physics Category based on a recent proportion of about 72%, roughly flat compared to 2025 (143,400); the university is located in Beijing (not in the province), so it is an inter-provincial application for Liaoning candidates; Liaoning accounts for about 2%–3% of the university's national enrollment, not a major source region, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Overall, the significant 25% expansion in the Physics Category in 2026 (from 8 to 10 students) is the most critical factor affecting rankings, which will notably lower the ranking (increase the ranking number); the slightly negative school reputation may mildly suppress application heat, but the high Douyin popularity and the heat of Computer Science majors create a certain offset; the number of provincial candidates is basically stable; considering a slight correction due to the negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking is about 20657, with a range of 20157–21157.

- Journalism (Physics Category)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (20157–21157), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a sprint and Tier 3 as a safety net; after the significant expansion in 2026, the ranking range has clearly shifted backward; candidates with rankings near the lower limit (<20157) can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Data Science and Big Data Technology; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (>21157) are advised to prioritize new majors in 2026 such as Sports Human Science and Sports Economics and Management.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3192 → 3263 → 3150 → 3742 → 3282, fluctuating within the 3100–3750 range; in 2024, there was a significant backward shift (3742), rebounding to 3282 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 460 in the past two years, and a baseline ranking of approximately 3282 in 2025; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 15 in 2021 → 11 in 2022 → 11 in 2023 → 9 in 2024 → 7 in 2025, showing a continuous reduction trend; the 2026 plan remains at 7, unchanged from 2025, marking the first stabilization after three consecutive years of enrollment reduction, with no further intensification of competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 180th in 2025 and 177th in 2026 on the Soft Science main list, with a slight upward trend; as the highest institution in the field of sports nationwide, it holds an irreplaceable position in sports disciplines; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving incidents such as the volleyball league home court controversy, which may slightly suppress the application psychology of some candidates; however, it ranks 18th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, and its distinctive sports characteristics still strongly attract target candidate groups; sports science is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly correlated with its enrollment majors such as Sports Economics and Management, Sports Rehabilitation, and Sports Human Science; disciplines like Journalism and Communication, and Foreign Languages and Literature are not individually rated, but they form differentiated competitiveness relying on sports characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Beijing (outside the province), making it a cross-provincial application for Liaoning candidates; Liaoning accounts for about 2%–3% of the university's national enrollment, not a major source region, so regional preference has limited impact; the social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors has significantly cooled (with continuous discouragement from 2023 to 2024), which may affect the application heat for majors like Journalism and Network and New Media; foreign language majors are generally met with lukewarm interest; the total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 200,000, with an estimated 56,400 in the History Category based on the recent proportion of about 28%, roughly unchanged from 2025 (56,300).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the historical ranking fluctuation within the 3100–3750 range, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the somewhat negative school reputation but high Douyin popularity, and the basically stable number of provincial candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will fluctuate slightly around the 2025 baseline of 3282; given that the negative reputation may cause some candidates to turn to other universities, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 3302, and a range of 2802–3802.
